description_long: This is a round ceramic plate with a raised rim and a decorative floral pattern on its top surface. The design features a central red and green star motif surrounded by five petal-shaped sections, each containing intricate green vines and red flowers, all bordered by a cream background. The plate's body is a warm terracotta color, giving it a traditional, handcrafted appearance. The sides of the plate are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the contrast between the ornate top and the plain exterior. The plate appears solid and sturdy, suitable for serving food or as a decorative piece. The overall craftsmanship and detailed pattern suggest it may be inspired by Mediterranean or Moorish ceramic styles.
description: A round terracotta-colored plate with a raised rim and an ornate red and green floral pattern on its top surface. The sides are smooth and unadorned, highlighting the decorative top.
description_view_0: Top view showing the full floral pattern with a central star and five petal-shaped sections, bordered by a raised rim.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the smooth, unadorned terracotta-colored exterior and the plate's thickness.
description_view_2: Bottom view similar to the top, revealing the same ornate floral pattern and raised rim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the plain terracotta-colored side with no visible decoration.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: Decorative floral patterns are visible on the top surface, featuring red, green, and cream motifs.
